title: The Cosmic Spokespersons
description: A mod focusing on special effects, dimensions, combat and bosses, with some plots.
body:
![Title](https://i.imgur.com/mYteeO6.png) _I couldn't find a font so I used The Combine font._

### About The Cosmic Spokespersons

The Cosmic Spokespersons mod is a boss-focused mod that expands the experience after defeating the Ender Dragon. It currently includes three unique bosses. Key features include:

*     Stunning special effects
*     High-quality boss battles
*     Story-driven guidance

### Some special effects display

![Guardian Of Causality](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1287/502/guardian-of-causality-gif-gif.gif) ![OuterUniverseThings](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1287/504/1746612858_759703_irkg-gif-gif.gif) ![The Lord Of the Universe](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1287/503/thelordoftheuniverse-gif-gif.gif)

### Note

*     [geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) is Requird
*     [attributefix](https://modrinth.com/mod/attributefix) is Requird
*     This mod has no plans to be ported to Fabric or other MC versions.
*     We will not make any compatibility changes to [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home).
*     This mod will not be open source.But if you want to know the source code of some special effects, you can come to me
